title: Main pages in repository
content: Primary pages include index.html, healthcare.html, education.html, culture.html, sporting-venues.html, harris-school-of-medicine.html, johnson-faculty-of-business.html, nbcc.html, state-university.html, and stadium-project.html.

title: Healthcare detail pages
content: Healthcare detail pages are brightwellmedicalcenter.html, campusofcare.html, cancerresearch.html, generalhospital.html, kensargenthouse.html.

title: Panorama viewer interaction model
content: Healthcare campaigns support immersive panorama viewing and interactive exploration.

title: Primary intent of platform
content: ISHARE is an immersive fundraising platform helping donors explore campaigns visually.

title: Sector recommendation policy
content: Recommend sectors first, then campaigns with links.

title: Cost sorting policy
content: Sort campaigns by known cost. If missing, mark as not specified.

title: Link-first answer policy
content: Always include direct campaign page links in responses.

title: Campaign catalog source
content: campaign-catalog.json is the main source for campaigns and pricing.
